audit_status.source_base: Greek Colossians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for above-things, old/new human, compassion/love, peace, word of Messiah, household code with safeguards.

verses.restored: Therefore, if you were raised together with Messiah, seek the things above, where Messiah is, seated at the right hand of the Divine.
Set your mind on the things above, not the things upon earth.
For you died, and your life has been hidden with Messiah in the Divine.
When Messiah, your life, is made manifest, then you also will be made manifest with him in glory.
Therefore put to death the members upon the earth: sexual immorality/misuse, uncleanness, passion, harmful desire, and greed, which is idolatry.
Because of these things the wrath of the Divine is coming.
In these you also once walked, when you were living in them.
But now you also put away all these: anger, fury, harmfulness, slander, shameful speech from your mouth.
Do not lie to one another, having stripped off the old human with its practices,
and having put on the new human, being renewed into knowledge according to image of the One who created it,
where there is not Greek and Judean, circumcision and uncircumcision, barbarian, Scythian, enslaved, free, but Messiah is all and in all.
Therefore, as chosen ones of the Divine, holy and beloved, put on inward compassions, kindness, humility, gentleness, patience,
bearing with one another and graciously forgiving each other, if anyone has complaint against another; just as the Lord graciously forgave you, so also you.
And over all these things, love, which is bond of completeness.
And let the peace of Messiah rule in your hearts, into which also you were called in one body; and become thankful.
Let the word of Messiah dwell in you richly, in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another, with psalms, hymns, spiritual songs, in grace singing in your hearts to the Divine.
And everything, whatever you do in word or work, do all in the name of Lord Jesus, giving thanks to the Divine Father through him.
Wives, be subject to husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.
Husbands, love wives and do not become bitter toward them.
Children, obey parents in all things, for this is pleasing in the Lord.
Fathers, do not provoke your children, lest they become discouraged.
Enslaved ones, obey in all things earthly masters, not in eye-service as people-pleasers, but in sincerity of heart, fearing/revering the Lord.
Whatever you do, work from soul/life, as to the Lord and not to humans,
knowing that from the Lord you will receive the repayment of the inheritance; you serve the Lord Messiah.
For the one doing wrong will receive back the wrong one did, and there is no partiality.

safety_note: Colossians 3 household code is preserved as ancient instruction but must not sanctify domination, abuse, coercive parenting, or slavery. It is read through the surrounding new-human body ethic: compassion, kindness, gentleness, forgiveness, love, peace, and no partiality.
